name: academorix/service-provider
purpose: Attribute-driven module service provider — declarative resource loading (migrations, config, translations, routes), olvlvl-cached discovery, and lifecycle hooks.
capabilities: #[AsModule] class attribute marks a package module
ServiceProvider base with declarative resource loading
Migrations, config, translations, routes auto-loaded from convention
when_to_use: Every Academorix package's ServiceProvider extends this base to inherit declarative resource loading.
when_not_to_use: For a plain Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider without discovery, extend Laravel's base directly.
